one_liner: Sony's print-hybrid: 3D forms wearing Ben-Day halftone skin, line layer mis-registered 1-2px off the color plate, hero on 12fps 2s while the camera runs 24fps — the comic page is literally moving.
render_law: Sony Pictures Animation Spider-Verse hybrid frame — the founding grammar of the Into/Across pipeline, a precise print-emulation system and NOT 'stylized 3D'. (1) FORMS: full 3D-modeled geometry, but every flat-shaded color fill is overprinted with Ben-Day halftone dots whose size scales with depth — fine dots on the face, coarse dots on the far background, so the halftone itself reads distance. (2) PRINT MIS-REGISTRATION: the color plate sits 1-2px offset from the black line layer, exactly like a cheap comic that slipped on the press — strongest at panel edges, and cyan/magenta separate visibly at high-contrast silhouettes (2-4px chromatic split, read as ink mis-registration, never as a lens defect). (3) LINE: bold brush-textured black line 3-6px, weight HEAVIER on the shadow side of the form, ink texture and dry-brush skips visible — never a clean vector edge. (4) SHADING: hard cel steps, 3 values maximum, no gradient; a hatch or cross-hatch shadow can carry a form the way a comic inker would hatch it. (5) COMIC DEVICES are diegetic physics here: onomatopoeia words break INTO the frame as drawn objects, speed lines are graphic streaks (never motion blur), and an action-panel divider bar may slice the frame diagonally. (6) DUAL-CADENCE MOTION: the hero animates at 12fps on 2s holds while camera and environment run 24fps — this rate-clash is the single most recognizable Spider-Verse signature. IMPERATIVE: PRINT-HYBRID — 3D forms fused with halftone comic printing. Forbid clean smooth CGI, plain flat cel with no dot texture, photoreal rendering, vector-clean line, motion-blur in place of drawn speed lines.
line_grammar: Bold brush-textured black line 3-6px, varied weight, thickening on the shadow side of each form; dry-brush ink skips and corner bleed visible. The color fill layer sits 1-2px off the line layer (press mis-registration). Interior detail is economical — a fold, a jaw plane — never fine-line rendering.
lens_grammar: 35-50mm treated as a comic panel frame. Cyan-magenta chromatic split 2-4px at high-contrast edges (mis-registration, a look choice not a defect). No lens flare unless drawn as a graphic star-burst. Depth stated by halftone dot scale and overlap as much as by focus.
light_law: Bold motivated key from a single graphic direction. Fill is a hard-stepped complementary flat color, never a gradient wrap. Rim light becomes a flat graphic shape in the accent hue, not a specular falloff. Highlights are opaque graphic white shapes. Shadow is a printed dot-density field, not a soft ambient pool.

palette_lock.bias: high-saturation primary comic separation — deep violet shadow plate, saturated vermilion-red mid, electric-cyan accent, hot printed-yellow highlight. Halftone dots carry the mids; neon-bright accents allowed because this is print ink, not naturalistic light. NO earth tone, NO desaturated grade, NO gradient shading, NO teal-orange cinematic wash.

motion_cadence: Hero character 12fps on 2s holds; camera and background 24fps — dual-cadence is mandatory. Speed lines drawn as graphic streaks, never motion blur. Freeze-frame allowed at a peak beat. Onomatopoeia snaps in on the impact frame and holds 2-3 frames. Smear at peak action is a painted comic streak, not a blur.
negative_lock: NO Miles Morales, NO Peter Parker, NO Peter B. Parker, NO Gwen Stacy, NO Miguel O'Hara, NO Spider-Man 2099, NO Kingpin, NO Prowler, NO any named Spider-Verse character
NO Spider-Man suit pattern (red-blue web, black-red), NO web-shooter, NO spider emblem
NO recognizable New York landmark or skyline
NO clean vector line — brush texture and ink skip are mandatory
NO smooth naturalistic shading — 3 hard cel steps maximum
NO motion blur — speed and smear are drawn graphic devices
Turkish onomatopoeia only — PAT, ŞIK, VUM, GÜM in bold comic letters; NO English POW/BAM/ZAP
Turkish label only — bold comic letterform with drop shadow, NO English signage
example_injection: Sony Spider-Verse print-hybrid frame. Halftone dots over flat color, line layer mis-registered 2px off the fills. Subject: Mamilas character on a rooftop mid-turn, 3-value cel shading, bold 4px brush-textured black line heavier on the shadow side of the jaw. Vermilion-red jacket over an electric-cyan sky, cyan-magenta chromatic split at the silhouette edge, fine face-dots against coarse background-dots reading depth. Hero pose held at 12fps while the camera pushes at 24fps. Turkish onomatopoeia 'ŞIK' breaks into the upper-right frame as a drawn object, bold comic letters with drop shadow. Background: a layered Istanbul rooftop, a Turkish sign 'AÇIK' as a flat cyan plate. Motion seed: head turning mid-arc on a 2s hold, a speed-line streak already drawn behind the shoulder. AVOID: Miles Morales, spider emblem, web-suit pattern, clean vector line, English POW, motion blur, naturalistic shading. Clean motion-ready start frame.

one_liner: MAPPA's underexposed cel: key light often absent, subject carved by a cold rim against crushed blue-black, cursed energy an abstract fractal smoke tendril — and at the peak, one or two ink-smear frames where the drawing dissolves into brush motion.
render_law: Contemporary MAPPA television-animation frame in the Jujutsu Kaisen production lineage — a deliberately UNDEREXPOSED 2D cel system, 1-1.5 stops below standard cel. (1) EXPOSURE: shadow zones dominate the frame; the subject is rim-lit rather than fill-lit, and the key light is frequently ABSENT — the form reads as a near-silhouette outlined by a cold edge. (2) CEL VALUES: 3 steps, but the shadow value is push-crushed toward blue-black; backgrounds desaturated hard. (3) LINE: confident 2-3px black at rest, HIGH interior line count (fabric folds, hair strand, muscle definition), but at the peak of an action it becomes an INK-SMEAR frame — one or two frames where the drawing dissolves into a brush-ink motion streak and then resolves back to clean line. This smear is the MAPPA signature, not decoration. (4) CURSED ENERGY: abstract fractal black-smoke tendrils with a faint teal-cyan core glow — NEVER a named franchise curse, technique icon, or domain. (5) BACKGROUNDS: photobash-heavy — real photo reference under a painted cool overlay, aggressive atmospheric perspective so the mid-ground fades hazy and grayscale. (6) EFFECTS: hand-drawn on 8-12 frame cycles, never CGI. Post: cold film curve, teal-blue shadow lift, saturation reserved only for a blood or cursed-energy accent against the desaturation. IMPERATIVE: STRICT PURE 2D CEL, authentic flat animation. Forbid any 3D, 2.5D, gradient-airbrush cel, or realistic light interpretation; forbid warm-palette dominance.
line_grammar: Confident 2-3px black line at rest with high interior detail (folds, strands, muscle). At the action peak, 1-2 ink-smear brush-motion frames dissolve the line before it resolves. Shadow value crushes toward blue-black; the line survives into the dark where the fill does not.
lens_grammar: Flat 2D. Simulated 24-35mm wide during action, 50mm portrait for the drama beat. 16:9. Compositional Dutch tilt permitted at an emotional or dread beat. No physical DOF — depth reads through atmospheric haze.
light_law: Rim-dominant. Key light is often absent, the rim outlining the form against a darker ground. Cold blue-black shadow, warm-amber OR cursed-teal rim. Bounce fill minimal or none. The cursed-energy tendril, when present, is a faint local teal glow source, not a bloom that floods the frame.

palette_lock.bias: cold blue-gray desaturation dominant — the frame lives below middle exposure; a single warm rim OR a cursed-teal accent is the only saturated event against the grey field. Blood, when present, is the one warm red permitted. NO earth-green, NO pastel, NO Ghibli-warm ambient, NO lifted flat midtone.

motion_cadence: Deliberate hold, then 1-2 ink-smear peak frames, then a hard hold on impact. 24fps camera, character 12fps, effects on 8fps loop. 2-3s hold after a climax action while atmosphere settles. Stillness carries dread; the smear carries violence.
negative_lock: NO Yuji Itadori, NO Megumi, NO Nobara, NO Gojo, NO Sukuna, NO Geto, NO Nanami, NO Toji, NO Mahito, NO any named Jujutsu Kaisen character
NO Shibuya, NO Tokyo Jujutsu High, NO Culling Game location, NO named JJK location
NO Sukuna finger, NO Ryomen mouth-mark, NO Gojo blindfold or six-eyes glow, NO domain-expansion visual signature
NO Jujutsu-Tech black-uniform school outfit

one_liner: The 1987-94 OVA paradox: every held frame painted to theatrical finish while the motion stays limited at 8-12fps — glossy hair with one airbrushed spec band, gouache backgrounds with brush ridges, and a warm 35mm print-fade with double-exposure halation rings.
render_law: Direct-to-video Japanese OVA frame in the 1987-1994 lineage — the OVA paradox as production law: every HELD frame is painted to theatrical finish while the MOTION stays limited (8-12fps feel). (1) CEL: confident 2-3px black line over a soft warm-shifted 2-value cel; hair reads as a single glossy mass with ONE airbrushed band of specular light; mouths small and matte; fabric folds densely inked. (2) BACKGROUNDS: gouache on board with visible brush ridges — NOT digital paint — with dense mechanical line detail and airbrushed metal highlights on any machine or prop. (3) OPTICAL ARTIFACTS: bright practicals (window, lamp, neon sign) bloom with double-exposure HALATION RINGS — a period optical-printer artifact, not modern glow — and cast shadows fall as hard diagonal cel shapes. (4) FILM TEXTURE: a visible 35mm grain layer over every frame, warm amber print-fade, slight line/fill mis-registration. (5) CAMERA: static and deliberate — the era held on the cel and let the painting speak. IMPERATIVE: this is a pastiche of the ERA'S production technique and print texture, ORIGINAL designs only, never a specific franchise. Forbid modern digital-clean gradients, sakuga-fluid 24fps motion, HDR bloom, 3D or 2.5D, named characters, or studio logos.
line_grammar: Confident 2-3px black line over soft warm-shifted 2-value cel. Hair a single glossy mass with one airbrushed specular band; small matte mouths; densely inked fabric folds. Slight period-authentic print mis-registration between line and fill.
lens_grammar: Flat 2D, simulated 35-40mm portrait framing typical of period OVA compositions. Static camera bias, minimal reframe. A visible 35mm grain layer and warm print-fade sit over the whole frame.
light_law: Warm practical key, soft warm-shifted cel shadow (hard diagonal shapes, never grey). Any bright practical blooms with a double-exposure halation ring; metal takes one airbrushed highlight band. No modern soft glow — the bloom is an optical-printer ring.

palette_lock.bias: warm film-stock cast throughout — amber print-fade in the highlights, muted desaturated secondary hues, visible grain living in every value step. Shadows are warm-brown, never neutral-grey. NO digital-clean gradient, NO HDR bloom, NO modern clean-cel saturation.

motion_cadence: Cel silhouette steps forward in deliberate limited-animation frames (8-12fps feel); film grain flutters over each hold; static camera — stillness and grain communicate period weight. 1.5s grain-flutter final hold. Motion is stepped, never fluid.
negative_lock: NO named franchise character, NO specific studio logo or watermark
NO modern digital-clean cel shading, NO HDR bloom, NO 3D or 2.5D render
NO smooth 24fps+ motion — must read as limited-animation stepped
NO cool digital grade — the print is warm-cast
Turkish label only — period-poster-style lettering, NO English signage
example_injection: Direct-to-video OVA frame, 1987-94 grammar. Mamilas character at 35mm portrait framing, static hold: 2-3px confident line, warm-shifted 2-value cel, hair a single glossy mass with one airbrushed spec band, small matte mouth. Behind: a gouache-on-board interior with visible brush ridges and a dense-lined original machine with airbrushed metal highlights. A desk lamp blooms with a double-exposure halation ring camera-left; its cast shadow falls as a hard diagonal cel across the wall. Warm amber print-fade, visible 35mm grain, slight line/fill mis-registration. Turkish label 'ANI' in period-poster lettering, upper-left. Motion seed: eyes mid-blink into a held look, grain about to flutter. AVOID: named franchise characters, studio logos, digital-clean gradient, HDR bloom, fluid 24fps, cool grade. Clean motion-ready start frame.

one_liner: Studio Pierrot's shinobi grammar: burnt-orange-and-navy utility costume with bandage wraps, Kishimoto paint-block brows, and chakra as an INWARD single-spiral coiling wind-rings around a fist — never an outward aura ball, never a named jutsu.
render_law: Studio Pierrot television-cel frame in the hidden-village shinobi lineage — confident 2-3px black line, flat 2-3 value cel, warm golden-orange key with deep forest-green secondary. What separates Pierrot-shinobi from every other shounen and MUST be present: (1) COSTUME GRAMMAR — burnt-orange and navy color-blocking, utility flak-vests, forearm bandage wraps, open-toe sandal silhouettes, plain unmarked kunai-class tools. (2) FACE — Kishimoto paint-block brows and hard triangular under-eye shadows. (3) MOVEMENT CULTURE — taijutsu: crouched sprint silhouettes, tree-branch launch poses, body-weight low. (4) CHAKRA — an INWARD single-spiral: it coils tight around a fist or underfoot as concentric wind-rings that lift leaf-litter in a small vortex — NEVER an outward glowing aura sphere, never a named jutsu or hand-sign sequence. (5) ENVIRONMENT — a hidden mountain-forest village: warm wood-and-stone facades, rope bridges, paper seals brushed with Turkish calligraphy, river-stone paths, log training posts, a distant mountain face implied but never carved. Sky stays clear noon-blue or dusk-amber; storm drama belongs to other worlds. Dust hangs in canopy sun-shafts. IMPERATIVE: STRICT PURE 2D CEL. Forbid outward aura spheres, horizontal face-stretch comedy (that is Toei grammar), 3D or 2.5D, gradient airbrush, cold desaturation.
line_grammar: Confident 2-3px black line, uniform weight at rest, a single hard smear frame at the peak of physical effort. Clean silhouette-first design; costume reads by its color-block shapes before its line.
lens_grammar: Flat 2D, simulated 35-50mm portrait for character beats, wider 24mm for training-ground establishing shots. 16:9. No lens flare.
light_law: Warm golden-orange key — sun through canopy or village lantern — with deep forest-green ambient fill, dust visible in the sun-shafts. The inward chakra spiral, when present, acts as a brief warm rim light coiling inward, never a bloom that floods the frame.

palette_lock.bias: warm golden-orange determination dominant, deep forest-green secondary shadow, warm dust-trail accents catching the canopy light. Shadow is green-brown, warm, never cold-neutral. NO cold desaturation, NO pastel, NO neon, NO storm-grey.

motion_cadence: Confident hold at rest; taijutsu beats snap with a single smear frame; at climax one inward chakra spiral coils around fist or feet, leaf-litter lifting in the vortex, warm dust trailing; settles into a determined final hold, 1-1.2s. Run-up reads as an arc approach — body low, arms back, dust trailing.
negative_lock: NO Naruto, NO Sasuke, NO Sakura, NO Kakashi, NO Itachi, NO Jiraiya, NO any named Naruto character
NO Hidden Leaf headband symbol, NO Akatsuki cloud-cloak, NO named jutsu hand-sign sequence
NO Valley of the End, NO Hokage Mountain carving, NO named franchise location
NO outward aura sphere — chakra is an inward wind-spiral only
NO Toei horizontal face-stretch comedy
NO cold or desaturated palette, NO pastel, NO 3D, NO gradient airbrush
Turkish label only — bold display letterform, NO English signage
example_injection: Studio Pierrot shinobi-world frame. Mamilas character crouched in a sprint pose on a river-stone path, confident 2-3px black outline, burnt-orange-and-navy costume blocking with a utility flak-vest and forearm wraps, Kishimoto paint-block brows set in resolve. Warm golden sun-shafts drop through the canopy with dust hanging; deep forest-green shadow. One inward chakra spiral coils around the raised fist as concentric wind-rings, leaf-litter lifting in the small vortex. Background: wood-and-stone village facades, a rope bridge, log training posts, a paper seal brushed with Turkish calligraphy 'MÜHÜR'. Turkish label 'AZİM' bold display letter, upper-right. Motion seed: the spiral mid-coil, about to tighten. AVOID: Naruto, Sasuke, leaf-headband symbol, jutsu hand-signs, carved mountain face, outward aura ball, face-stretch comedy. Clean motion-ready start frame.

one_liner: WIT/MAPPA colossal-wall gravity: near-monochrome grey-green military desaturation, one muted signal-accent (a flare, a cloak trim), the human placed small as a scale indicator against a mass filling 80% of the vertical — stillness IS the tension.
render_law: Contemporary WIT Studio / MAPPA television-animation frame in the Attack on Titan environmental lineage — scale-dread through composition, not motion. (1) ENVIRONMENT: immense stone walls and masses, colossal scale IMPLIED through composition (the wall or architecture filling 70-85% of the vertical frame), never stated as a named specific wall. (2) GRADE: grey-green military desaturation dominates, near-monochrome — all secondary hues pulled toward olive-grey — with exactly ONE muted signal color per composition (a flare, a cloak trim, a single warning light). No warmth, no saturation bloom. (3) CEL: confident 2-3px black line, desaturated 2-3 value cel shading, texture emphasis on WEATHERED stone and coarse fabric over clean color fill; surface weathering and staining baked into the mid-tones. (4) LIGHT: overcast grey-green diffuse ambient key with NO warm bounce; a torch or signal flare is the only local hard source in interiors, reading as a single muted accent against the grey field; shadow is flat and heavy, communicating institutional dread rather than filmic drama. (5) COMPOSITION+MOTION: the human figure small at the base or mid-frame as a scale indicator; near-stillness as the motion grammar with ONE atmospheric shift only (wind through dust, a distant silhouette crossing, a flare igniting); the camera holds — speed never communicates scale, stillness does. IMPERATIVE: STRICT PURE 2D CEL. Forbid 3D, warm or bright grading, saturation bloom, and any named franchise transformation or emblem.
line_grammar: Confident 2-3px black line, desaturated 2-3 value cel shading. Texture emphasis on weathered stone and coarse fabric over clean color; staining and wear baked into mid-tones rather than drawn as separate detail.
lens_grammar: Wide establishing lens (24-28mm simulated) for scale-dread compositions placing the human as a scale indicator; tighter 50mm for a survival-detail human beat. 16:9 or 2.35:1 for maximum vertical scale impact.
light_law: Overcast grey-green diffuse ambient key, no warm bounce. A single hard torch or flare is the only local source in interiors, a muted signal-accent against the grey. Shadow reads flat and heavy — dread, not drama.

palette_lock.bias: grey-green military desaturation dominant, near-monochrome, a single muted signal-color accent (a flare, a cloak trim) carrying the only saturation in the frame. NO warmth, NO saturation bloom, NO pastel, NO clean bright fill.

motion_cadence: Near-stillness; one atmospheric shift only — wind through dust, a distant silhouette crossing, a flare igniting; the camera holds, speed never communicates scale, stillness does. Tension hold 2-3s.
negative_lock: NO Eren, NO Mikasa, NO Levi, NO Armin, NO Erwin, NO any named Attack on Titan character
NO Titan-transformation visual signature, NO Survey Corps wings-of-freedom emblem or insignia
NO named specific wall (Wall Maria, Rose, Sina) — generic colossal wall environment only
NO ODM-gear brand signature
NO warm palette, NO saturation bloom, NO pastel, NO 3D
Turkish label only — military-stencil lettering, NO English signage
example_injection: WIT/MAPPA wall-world frame. Subject: a lone figure in military-style gear standing at the base of an immense grey-green weathered-stone wall, scale-dread composition with the wall filling 80% of the vertical frame, the figure small at the bottom third as a scale indicator. Desaturated grey-green dominant, one muted signal-orange flare glowing at the figure's side — the only saturation in frame. Overcast harsh light, no warm bounce, staining baked into the stone mid-tones. Turkish label 'DUVAR' in military-stencil lettering, small, lower-left. Motion seed: dust drifting across the frame, about to settle into stillness. AVOID: named AoT characters, Titan-transformation, Survey Corps emblem, named wall, warm palette, 3D. Clean motion-ready start frame.

one_liner: MAPPA manhwa-adaptation: razor-sharp angular lines at digital-panel density, cold steel-blue with ONE electric-indigo accent, and the genre's signature translucent SYSTEM WINDOW hanging in air casting glass-blue screen-light on the subject.
render_law: High-fidelity manhwa-adaptation frame in the Solo Leveling environmental lineage — razor-sharp angular linework at digital-painted panel density, MORE interior line detail than TV cel. (1) TWO REGISTERS, one declared per frame: a NIGHT CITY of glass towers with clean cyan-white window grids and wet-asphalt reflections, OR a GATE-DUNGEON interior of rough-hewn stone lit by cold bioluminescent veins in the rock (no torches). (2) GRADE: cold steel-blue and graphite with ONE electric-indigo accent. (3) SIGNATURE — the floating SYSTEM WINDOW: a translucent glass-blue UI panel hanging in air with thin cyan borders and Turkish interface text, casting a faint screen-light on the near side of the subject. (4) COMPOSITION — a POWER-ASCENT ladder: strong verticals, the subject framed low looking up or high looking down, never flat eye-level. (5) THRESHOLD — the Gate exterior exhales a slow purple-black mist mass, a shimmering vertical portal-plane with void beyond. (6) POWER MOMENTS read as ground-particle uplift and a faint violet-indigo silhouette rim — atmosphere, never a named skill. IMPERATIVE: STRICT high-fidelity 2D cel/manhwa shading. Forbid painterly blur and photobash-collage backgrounds (that is jjk_mappa grammar), photoreal 3D, warm-color dominance, and torch-lit fantasy-dungeon cliché.
line_grammar: Razor-sharp angular linework at high-fidelity density — more interior line than typical TV cel, closer to a digital-painted manhwa panel finish. Edges are clean and hard, not brush-textured.
lens_grammar: Simulated wide 24-28mm for dungeon-corridor scale, tighter 50mm for a character power-ascent close-up. 16:9 or 2.35:1 for corridor scenes. Strong vertical compositions.
light_law: Cold steel-blue key; bioluminescent rock veins or cyan window grids are the only practicals; electric-indigo accent as rim only. The system window casts a faint glass-blue screen-light on the near side of the subject. No warm fill anywhere.

palette_lock.bias: cold dark-blue and steel-grey dominant, an electric-indigo power-aura as the single accent, cyan window/vein practicals as the only cool highlights. Shadow is blue-black, never warm. NO warmth, NO pastel, NO earth-tone, NO torch-amber.

motion_cadence: Atmosphere thickens first — ground particles lift; then one rank-aura event, a violet-indigo silhouette outline blooming once; settles into a brooding low-hold, no bounce. The system window fades up cleanly, never snaps.
negative_lock: NO Sung Jin-Woo, NO Cha Hae-In, NO any named Solo Leveling character, NO shadow-soldier army designs
NO named rank/gate classification iconography (S-Rank, E-Rank as franchise branding), NO monarch-aura signature
NO warm palette, NO pastel, NO earth-tone dominance
NO painterly blur, NO photobash-collage background
NO photoreal 3D render, NO torch-lit fantasy-dungeon cliché
Turkish label only — sharp geometric sans lettering, NO English signage

one_liner: Studio Pierrot's Soul Society: stark white-stone fortress architecture against true ink-black spiritual-pressure void, extreme contrast with minimal midtone, one warm amber soul-energy accent — contre-jour courtyards holding tension in stillness.
render_law: 2D cel-animation frame in the Bleach Soul Society environmental lineage — extreme black/white contrast as the core visual law. (1) ENVIRONMENT, three registers: a stark WHITE-STONE fortress-city (Seireitei-style clean geometric stone walls, tiled roofs, wide empty courtyards); weathered WOODEN-ALLEY slum quarters (Rukongai-style low wooden buildings, paper lanterns, dusty paths); and an abstract SPIRITUAL-PRESSURE VOID (a formless charcoal-black atmospheric mass with faint white particulate, never a named technique). (2) CONTRAST: confident 2-3px black line, extreme value contrast — true stark-white fields against true ink-black mass, minimal midtone step. (3) ACCENT: a single soul-energy glow in warm orange-amber is the only chromatic event. (4) LIGHT: stark contre-jour or overhead light in the white-stone courtyards — near-blown highlight against ink-black shadow, no soft gradient; warm lantern glow is the only midtone source in the Rukongai-alley register. (5) COMPOSITION: wide, still courtyards for tension; tight alley framing for intimacy. IMPERATIVE: STRICT PURE 2D CEL with extreme black/white contrast as the governing law. Forbid 3D, painterly gradient, and muddy midtone-heavy grading.
line_grammar: Confident 2-3px black line, extreme-contrast cel shading — true black and true white with a minimal single midtone step. Architecture reads by hard geometric edges; the void reads by absence of line entirely.
lens_grammar: Flat 2D. Wide static framing for courtyard tension, tighter 35-50mm for alley intimacy. 16:9. No physical DOF.
light_law: Stark contre-jour or overhead light in white-stone courtyards — near-blown highlight versus ink-black shadow, no soft gradient. Warm lantern glow is the only midtone source in Rukongai-alley scenes. The spiritual-pressure void emits no light; it is negative space.

palette_lock.bias: stark ink-black mass against stark near-white architecture, a single warm soul-energy amber as the only accent. The midtone step is minimal and warm-neutral, never a muddy grey wash. NO muddy midtone dominance, NO pastel, NO cold-blue dominance.

motion_cadence: Held stillness in the white courtyard; one spiritual-pressure atmospheric mass rises once at the edge of frame, a warm amber energy particle answering; settles into a stark high-contrast final hold, 1.5s.
negative_lock: NO Ichigo, NO Rukia, NO Renji, NO Aizen, NO Byakuya, NO any named Bleach character
NO specific Zanpakutō weapon design, NO Gotei-13 division/squad crest, NO Hollow mask design
NO muddy midtone-heavy grading, NO pastel, NO cold-blue dominance
NO 3D render, NO painterly gradient
Turkish label only — sharp brush-stroke lettering, NO English signage

Extreme contrast, minimal midtone. Contre-jour overhead light. Turkish label 'RUH' in sharp brush-stroke lettering, small, lower corner. Clean motion-ready start frame.

one_liner: 1960s-70s newsprint: visible CMYK halftone rosettes growing into shadow, cyan/magenta plates drifting 1-2px off the black lineart, solid-black ink shadows, bare aged paper as the only white — a page photographed, never a digital drawing.
render_law: Simulated vintage printed comic in the 1960s-70s newsprint lineage — every frame reads as a page photographed from an AGED comic, never a digital drawing. (1) HALFTONE: midtones and shadows resolve into visible CMYK halftone rosettes — dot size grows into shadow, dissolves toward highlight. (2) MIS-REGISTRATION: print registration is imperfect — cyan and magenta plates drift 1-2px off the black lineart, strongest near panel edges. (3) INK + PAPER: solid black ink owns the deepest shadows and every outline; paper is the only white — aged warm, slightly foxed at the corners. (4) FLAT PLATES: colors are flat plate fills, never gradients — a sky is one cyan plate, a face one flesh plate with red halftone blush. (5) DRAWN DEVICES: speed lines, impact bursts and emanata are physics here. (6) WEATHERING: hairline cracks inside large black fills, tiny ink skips at line ends; a visible panel border with gutter paper allowed when the beat wants it. IMPERATIVE: AGED CMYK NEWSPRINT COMIC. Forbid smooth digital gradients, 3D shading, photoreal texture, clean vector crispness, manga screentone, and anime cel look.
line_grammar: Thick confident black ink outline with brush-weight variance — heavy on the shadow side and undersides, hairline on the light side. Cross-hatching and feathered hatching carry form shadow before halftone does. Faces get economy lines — a single interior stroke states the nose. All lettering hand-inked.
lens_grammar: Flat graphic staging with forced comic perspective — dramatic low-angle hero shots, extreme foreshortened fists toward camera. No photographic DOF; depth stated by overlap and line density. Panel-composition logic — subjects break the panel border on a strong beat.
light_law: Light is a drawing decision: hard-edged graphic shadow shapes in solid black or dense halftone, cast in one stated direction per panel. No soft falloff anywhere. Highlight equals bare paper left unprinted. Night scenes are a blue plate printed over everything with black shadow shapes on top.

palette_lock.bias: warm aged-newsprint paper base carrying the highlights, flat CMYK plate primaries (cyan sky, magenta blush, solid-black ink shadow), a saturated vermilion-red as the hero accent. Color is printed ink, not light — flat plates only. NO smooth gradient, NO desaturated cinematic grade, NO cool digital white.

motion_cadence: Step-framed pose-to-pose feel: 2-4 stated poses per action with drawn speed-line trails bridging them. Transitions read as panel slides or page turns. Impact frames flash to a single one-color burst plate for one frame.
negative_lock: NO Marvel or DC identities — NO Spider-Man, NO Batman, NO Superman, NO Hulk — NO their logos or masks
NO 3D shading, NO smooth gradient, NO photoreal texture
NO digital vector crispness, NO anti-aliased clean edge
NO modern flat-design minimalism
NO manga screentone, NO anime cel look
Turkish label only — hand-inked comic lettering; speech bubbles and burst shapes with Turkish text allowed, NO English lettering
example_injection: Aged newsprint comic frame. Subject: Mamilas character as a kid hero in low-angle mid-shot, one arm thrown forward breaking the panel border, flesh tone printed as warm halftone with red-dot blush, heavy black ink on the shadow side of the jaw. The magenta plate drifts 1px off the lineart at the shoulder. Background: one flat cyan sky plate, drawn speed lines converging on the fist, a burst shape behind with 'GÜM!' hand-inked inside. Aged warm paper with a foxed corner, halftone rosettes visible in every midtone, a hairline crack in the large black fill bottom-left. Motion seed: this is the wind-up pose — trailing speed lines already drawn, the next pose implied. AVOID: Spider-Man, Batman logos, gradients, 3D shading, manga screentone, English lettering. Clean motion-ready start frame.
